title: more than combat, item
description: More than combat item Under development!
body:
## Important 
I cannot update mod due to laptop charging port being faulty

# dependencies - 0.19.2 version mod loader fabric
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Fabric API
# Dependencies for Qulit
- QFAPI (Quilted Fabric API)
- QKL (Quilt Kotlin Libraries)

# Textures
Some Textures look werid because i am not great with drawin 32x32 pixel art

# Info

This mod add new type of combat
the combat are craftable!

Only three combat currently!

Only Craftable and currently:
## star sword:
deal damage 3-10hp (usage xp)

![One diamond on top middle and nether star in middle and stick below nether star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56b435444e2eff117c6b17d69e31f943289c49c3.png)

## rng sword:
randomize your damage deal to mob (usage xp)

![One Emerald on top middle and nether star in middle and stick below nether star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d72d44e0cecf4cec84e8b3186b4860794553bbd9.png)

## amethyst sword
When player hit mob it highlight mob near player and shockwave:deal damage 1-4 hp depends how far are u

![Two amethyst in middle top and middle and stick below amethyst in middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec608c0e57cb0543696c1d7f3de48937ac60595b.png)

## Pickaxe Smelting

![In row 1(top), one coal to left blast furnace in middle and coal right in row2, coal in middle. In row3 stick in below coal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/017303449f300ebbd1c8e7551cbbd1090c9915d6.png)

To use the Pickaxe smelting
You must make your pickaxe on your offhand and ore on mainhand and crouch and right clicking to smelt it quickly!

## Poison sword
It's craftable with poisonous potato but placing it like shape of sword
You know what name for it cause poison on victim/mob

## Repair station block
![row1/3:3 iron on top, row2: coal and block of amethyst and coal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed89ba90e966b36fdb8a3caef7150779e8479791.png)

When u right click on them with tool(damage) it's will fix your tool when it's done it will play noteblock sfx U need to recharge first before using it

Recharging it use Repair kit 1/2 depends what tier are u using to charge more
2:10 per uses charge
1:5 per uses charge

## Trash bin
You know was it does It's delete item! also beware of put your item unwillingly

![Cauldorn Shape iron lava in middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aafade0a30f958ea2e6a7cacb1a73655a737e184.png)

## Tool Linker
It's one most required tool on technology in this mod It can be use to connect stuff by
Shift and Right Clicking To Select/Register

![Two iron above middle and below and in middle are stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a6564ea1729605926cf37346c31e3b1804155e.png)

## Power Generator
It's generate power for devices that required power
![Row:1Coal Block | Redstione Block | Coal Block  , Row:2 Iron Ingot | Furnace | Iron Ingot , Row3: Iron Ingot | Iron Ingot | Iron Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/887054769a2d770b9c1d540f317fd812483a74ad.png)

| Fuel | Burn Time | Power Generated |
|------|-----------|-----------------|
| Coal / Charcoal | 800 ticks | 1600 power |
| Blaze Rod | 1200 ticks | 2400 power |
| Coal Block | 8000 ticks | 16000 power |
| Lava Bucket | 20000 ticks | 40000 power |

## Wireless Charger
Like repair station repair when player hold item that damaged

![Row1:Gold Ingot | Ender Pearl | Gold Ingot, Row2: Iron Ingot | redstone  dust | Iron ingot , Row3: Gold Ingot | Iron Ingot | Gold Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/575fd09c948011e792e6dbfb7d78f9c314d144b9.png)

# Ore
There are one ore currently

## Tin ore
Which can make it to bronze ingot
By crafting

![Two copper and Two tin place in oppsite direction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b67c47841090eaeae7e4fbbca62d5c7eb4318fa.png)

## Follow update
Making combat great ideal future follow up!
